---
title: '10/19/14 | Journal'
date: '2014-10-19T15:07:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7607413810336874039'
blogger_filename: '/2014/10/101914-journal.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<br />
Today is Sunday. We've been going to church on Sat's so it's been a relaxed morning. I've been at my computer now for over an hour. Got lost following one article after another. I need to go get food for everyone now. <br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
